---
title: "An applied comparison of Machine Learning (ML) versus Deep Learning (DL) approaches using UAV Imagery"
id: materialspat-analysis-2
order: 144
summary: "An article on the practical impacts and tradeoffs of applying DL and ML to an applied research task."
source_url: "https://doi.org/10.3390/rs12162602"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-3
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-2.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://doi.org/10.3390/rs12162602>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
